## Automated Tests Required

### 3-1 TickOrch 004 â€” Integration
**Test file**: `tests/integration/tick-orchestrator/bindtoclose_chain.spec.luau`
**What to test**:
- `BindToClose` callback invokes `TickOrchestrator.stop()` BEFORE MSM T11 transition fires
- Order: `[stop, MSM:T11â†’ServerClosing broadcast, ProfileStore release]`
- `stop()` halts within â‰¤5ms (assertion via `os.clock()` delta)
- NO currency grant calls during shutdown (mock `Currency.grantMatchRewards`, expect zero invocations)
- ProfileStore not called directly by this code (template-vendored handles itself)
**Edge cases**: BindToClose fires while MSM in `Lobby` (no T11 needed); BindToClose fires while MSM in `Result` mid-grant (grant must already be committed before stop)
**Estimated test count**: ~5 integration tests

### 3-2 CSM 003 â€” Logic
**Test file**: `tests/unit/crowd-state-server/hue_f6.spec.luau` + `active_relics_cap.spec.luau`
**What to test (F6)**:
- `hue = ((join_index - 1) mod 12) + 1` for join_index âˆˆ {1, 2, 12, 13, 24}
- Hue field IS NOT writeable post-create (assert error on direct mutation, or reject via API)
- Hue NOT skin-derived â€” `Skin` enum value cannot mutate hue (Pillar 4 anti-P2W)
**What to test (activeRelics cap)**:
- 1st through 4th `_grantRelic` calls succeed; 5th rejected
- `activeRelics` table size never exceeds 4
- `CrowdRelicChanged` BindableEvent fires on each successful grant; not on rejection
**Edge cases**: join_index=0 (impossible â€” assert); join_index>1e6 (modulo holds); 5th relic during round (silent reject vs fire-rejected-event â€” verify per GDD)
**Estimated test count**: ~10 unit tests

### 3-3 CSM 004 â€” Logic
**Test file**: `tests/unit/crowd-state-server/composed_radius_f1.spec.luau` + `recompute_radius.spec.luau`
**What to test (F1)**:
- `radius = (2.5 + sqrt(count) * 0.55) * radiusMultiplier`
- count=1, mult=1.0 â†’ 3.05; count=300, mult=1.0 â†’ 12.03
- count=1, mult=0.5 â†’ 1.53 (lower bound); count=300, mult=1.5 â†’ 18.04 (upper bound)
- Range enforcement: assertion `radius âˆˆ [1.53, 18.04]` per manifest
**What to test (recomputeRadius write contract)**:
- `recomputeRadius(crowdId, newMultiplier)` accepts `newMultiplier âˆˆ [0.5, 1.5]`; `assert` rejects out-of-range
- Sole caller test: code-review only (cannot enforce at runtime per ADR-0004 Â§No-traceback)
**Edge cases**: count=0 (impossible after F5 clamp); newMultiplier=0.5 boundary; newMultiplier=1.5 boundary; newMultiplier=NaN (assert reject)
**Estimated test count**: ~12 unit tests

### 3-4 CSM 006 â€” Logic (highest-risk story this sprint)
**Test file**: `tests/unit/crowd-state-server/state_evaluator.spec.luau` + `grace_timer_f7.spec.luau` + `crowdeliminated_signal.spec.luau`
**What to test (state machine)**:
- Active â†’ GraceWindow when count==1 AND stillOverlapping==true
- GraceWindow â†’ Active when count>1 OR stillOverlapping==false (overlap clears)
- GraceWindow â†’ Eliminated when graceTimer reaches 3.0s AND stillOverlapping==true
- No revival from Eliminated (any count delta ignored)
**What to test (F7 grace timer)**:
- Timer starts on Activeâ†’GraceWindow transition (not pre-emptively)
- Timer accumulates per tick at 15 Hz (45 ticks = 3.0s)
- Tie-break: timer expires SAME tick as overlap clears â†’ Active wins (per GDD Â§States L94)
**What to test (CrowdEliminated reliable RemoteEvent)**:
- Fires exactly ONCE per crowd on Activeâ†’Eliminated transition
- Payload: `{crowdId, eliminationTime}` per ADR-0001
- BindableEvent server-only sibling fires for RoundLifecycle subscription (CSM story-006 contract)
**Edge cases**: count=0 impossible (F5 clamp); rapid Activeâ†”GraceWindow oscillation; Eliminated state continues broadcasting (handed off to CSM 008)
**Estimated test count**: ~18 unit tests

### 3-5 CSM 008 â€” Integration
**Test file**: `tests/unit/crowd-state-server/broadcastall.spec.luau` + `tests/integration/crowd-state-server/eliminated_continues.spec.luau`
**What to test (broadcastAll)**:
- Phase 8 hook signature `broadcastAll(tickCount): ()`; sole caller TickOrchestrator
- Buffer codec `BufferCodec/CrowdState.luau` consumed (Foundation network-layer-ext story-003)
- 30 B/crowd payload size assertion
- `tick: uint16` monotonic write per broadcast
- `UnreliableRemoteEvent.FireAllClients` invoked per tick (mock + assert)
**What to test (eliminated continues)**:
- Crowd in Eliminated state: still appears in broadcast payload with `state=Eliminated, count=1`
- Until `RoundLifecycle.destroyAll` removes record
**Performance assertion**:
- Phase 8 budget â‰¤0.4 ms per tick @ 12 crowds (math-proxy synthetic test; real-server-soak deferred to MVP-Integration-1 per ADR-0003)
- Bandwidth: 12 crowds Ã— 30 B Ã— 15 Hz = 5.4 KB/s steady (matches manifest L174)
**Edge cases**: 0 crowds (skip broadcast or empty payload â€” verify per GDD); 12 crowds + Eliminated all (boundary)
**Estimated test count**: ~15 unit + integration tests

### 3-6 MSM 002 â€” Logic
**Test file**: `tests/unit/match-state-server/transition_driver.spec.luau` + `countdown_ladder.spec.luau`
**What to test (transitions)**:
- T1 Lobbyâ†’Countdown:Ready when participation count â‰¥2 (in â‰¤67ms = 1 tick @ 15 Hz)
- T2 Countdown:Readyâ†’Lobby revert when count drops to 1 (within 1 tick)
- T3 Countdown:Readyâ†’Countdown:Snap at 7.0s elapsed (max observed â‰¤7.067s @ 15 Hz)
- T4 Countdown:Snapâ†’Active at 10.0s total elapsed AND #participating â‰¥1
- T5 Countdown:Snapâ†’Result at 10.0s AND #participating==0 (everyone AFK'd) â€” `RoundLifecycle.createAll` NOT called; `meta.winnerId == nil`
**What to test (call-order)**:
- T4: `[createAll, MatchStateChanged_broadcast]` in sequence (use `TestMatchStateBroadcastSpy`)
- Snap-freeze rule preserved (story-001 contract â€” no participation flips during Snap)
**Edge cases**: 2-player lobby with one DC during Ready (T2 revert); rapid AFK-toggle-back-on at t=6.99s (Readyâ†’Snap still fires at 7.0s)
**Estimated test count**: ~12 unit tests

### 3-7 MSM 003 â€” Logic
**Test file**: `tests/unit/match-state-server/phase6_timercheck.spec.luau` + `f4_tiebreak.spec.luau` + `phase6_before_phase7.spec.luau`
**What to test (Phase 6 hook)**:
- Hook signature `MatchStateServer.timerCheck(): ()` per arch Â§5.2 L595
- Body: if `_state == "Active"` AND `os.clock() - _stateStartTime >= 300.0` â†’ resolve F4, set `_winnerId`, T7 transition
- T7 fires within 1 tick of 300.0s threshold (max observed â‰¤300.067s @ 15 Hz)
**What to test (F4 tiebreak)**:
- Highest count wins
- Tie on count â†’ earliest peakTimestamp wins (`RoundLifecycle.getPeakTimestamp` consulted)
- Tie on timestamp â†’ `argmin(UserId)` wins
- Determinism: 10 repeated runs produce identical winner
**What to test (Phase 6 < Phase 7 ordering)**:
- Same-tick: t=300.0s AND CrowdEliminated queued
- Phase 6 fires T7 first â†’ state becomes Result
- Phase 7 evaluates `_state ~= Active` guard, silently drops queued elim
- Single `MatchStateChanged` broadcast (count=1)
- `meta.winnerId` from F4 using counts at Phase 6 time, NOT last-standing
**Edge cases**: 12-way tie at count=300 (UserId tiebreak chain); peakTimestamp same to nanosecond (impossible practically â€” verify deterministic ordering)
**Estimated test count**: ~14 unit tests

### 3-8 MSM 004 â€” Logic
**Test file**: `tests/unit/match-state-server/phase7_elim_consumer.spec.luau` + `double_signal_guard.spec.luau` + `t8_instant_win.spec.luau`
**What to test (Phase 7 hook)**:
- Hook signature `MatchStateServer.eliminationConsumer(): ()` per arch Â§5.2 L596
- Drains queued CrowdEliminated reliable RemoteEvents from CSM Phase 5
- T6 last-standing: 2 active â†’ 1 eliminated â†’ stateâ†’Result; `_winnerId` = remaining via F4
**What to test (double-signal guard)**:
- 2 crowds eliminated SAME tick â†’ 2 CrowdEliminated signals queued
- `_transitionTo(Result)` called EXACTLY ONCE (idempotent guard via `_state ~= Active` check)
- Broadcast count=1
**What to test (T8 instant win)**:
- Sole survivor remains (others Eliminated or DC'd via PlayerRemoving)
- F8 detection fires `transitionTo(Result)` with `meta.rivalDisconnected=true`
- Order: `grantMatchRewards` â†’ broadcast (within 1 tick)
- `meta.winnerId` = sole survivor's crowdId
**Edge cases**: All 12 crowds eliminated same tick (T6 path); player DC during Phase 7 mid-drain (T8 fires after drain completes)
**Estimated test count**: ~16 unit tests

### 3-9 MSM 005 â€” Integration
**Test file**: `tests/integration/match-state-server/grant_before_broadcast.spec.luau` + `t9_destroy_clear_broadcast.spec.luau`
**What to test (T9 ordering)**:
- Result, 10s elapsed; timer fires
- Sequence log: `[destroyAll, clearAll, broadcast_Intermission]` â€” no inversions
**What to test (Result-entry grant ordering)**:
- Active exits via T6/T7/T8
- Spy log: `[grantMatchRewards, MatchStateChanged_broadcast("Result")]` â€” grant commits before any client receives Result
**What to test (T10 flag reset)**:
- Intermission with some flags FALSE
- 10s elapses
- `getParticipation(p) == TRUE` for every connected player
- State = Lobby
**Edge cases**: BindToClose during T9 (3-1 contract â€” no grant during shutdown); player DC during Intermission (flag reset still fires for connected only)
**Estimated test count**: ~10 integration tests

### 3-10 RL 002 â€” Logic
**Test file**: `tests/unit/round-lifecycle/peak_tracking_f1.spec.luau` + `peak_strict_gt.spec.luau`
**What to test (F1 strict `>` rule)**:
- newCount > peakCount â†’ update peakCount + peakTimestamp + finalCount
- newCount == peakCount â†’ DO NOT update peakTimestamp; finalCount=newCount
- newCount < peakCount â†’ peakCount unchanged; finalCount=newCount
**What to test (signal guard)**:
- CountChanged for crowdId NOT in `_crowds` (post-destroyAll, spectator) â†’ silent return; no mutation
- Subscription added to `_janitor` in createAll; auto-disposed in destroyAll
**Edge cases**: peakCount=0 initial state; rapid count flux (100â†’101â†’100â†’102); CountChanged after destroyAll (Janitor disposed â€” should never fire)
**Estimated test count**: ~10 unit tests

### 3-11 CRB 001 â€” Logic
**Test file**: `tests/unit/crowd-replication-broadcast/tick_is_newer_f4.spec.luau` + `mirror_cache.spec.luau`
**What to test (F4 tick_is_newer uint16 wrap)**:
- `tick_is_newer(0, 65535) = true` (wrap-aware)
- `tick_is_newer(65534, 65535) = false`
- `tick_is_newer(32767, 0) = false` (â‰¥ half-window, treat stale)
- `tick_is_newer(1, 0) = true`
**What to test (mirror cache)**:
- `get(crowdId)` returns nil for unknown crowdId (NOT empty table, NOT default struct, NOT error)
- Insertion via subscriber path (mock broadcast event)
- crowdId uniqueness: 5-min round, 12 players â†’ no two different crowdId entries for same player.UserId
- Read-only: no public write API exposed
**Edge cases**: Stale packet (tick<lastReceived) â†’ drop; out-of-order arrival in same window â†’ use F4 to decide; Eliminated state mirror persists until destroyAll signal
**Estimated test count**: ~12 unit tests

### 3-12 RL 003 â€” Logic
**Test file**: `tests/unit/round-lifecycle/eliminated_idempotent.spec.luau` + `dc_freeze_at_disconnect.spec.luau`
**What to test (eliminationTime idempotent â€” F2)**:
- `_onEliminated(crowdId)` first fire: `eliminationTime â‰¥ tBefore`
- Second fire: `eliminationTime` UNCHANGED from first (idempotent guard)
**What to test (DC freeze)**:
- Player A's record `finalCount=150, eliminationTime=nil`
- `onPlayerRemoving(A)` fires â†’ record STILL exists (NOT removed)
- `record.eliminationTime â‰¥ tBefore`
- Subsequent `getPlacements()` after `setWinner` includes A as Rank 2..N entry with `crowdCount=150, survived=false`
**What to test (subscriptions cleanup)**:
- `CrowdEliminatedServer` BindableEvent subscription added to `_janitor` in createAll
- `Players.PlayerRemoving` subscription added to `_janitor` in createAll
- Both disposed in destroyAll
**Edge cases**: PlayerRemoving for player NOT in `_crowds` (spectator) â†’ silent return; PlayerRemoving for already-eliminated player (eliminationTime preserved); DC during destroyAll mid-execution
**Estimated test count**: ~10 unit tests

### 3-13 CSM 005 â€” Logic
**Test file**: `tests/unit/crowd-state-server/position_lag_f2.spec.luau` + `nil_hrp_guard.spec.luau`
**What to test (F2 lerp)**:
- Per-tick: `record.position = lerp(record.position, HRP.Position, CROWD_POS_LAG=0.15)`
- After 1 tick: position is 15% toward target
- After many ticks: position converges to target (asymptotic)
**What to test (nil HRP guard)**:
- `Character.HumanoidRootPart == nil` (void fall, respawn) â†’ position retained, no error
- `_stillOverlapping` flag NOT cleared (collision state preserved across respawn)
**Edge cases**: Character itself nil (mid-LoadCharacter); HRP exists but Position==Vector3.zero (valid, lerp toward origin); rapid character respawn cycles
**Estimated test count**: ~8 unit tests

### 3-14 TickOrch 005 â€” Logic
**Test file**: `tests/unit/tick-orchestrator/instrumentation_disabled_overhead.spec.luau` + `per_phase_deltas.spec.luau`
**What to test (disabled-mode overhead)**:
- Default `_instrumentationEnabled = false`
- Per-tick overhead vs baseline: <0.05 ms (assertion via 1000-tick synthetic loop comparison)
**What to test (per-phase deltas when enabled)**:
- `_instrumentationEnabled = true` â†’ records `os.clock` delta per phase + total tick time + tick-arrival jitter
- 9 phase deltas captured per tick
- Output channel: rate-limited `warn` (not flooded)
**Edge cases**: Phase pcall failure inside instrumented run â€” outer instrumentation still records phase total; instrumentation toggle mid-run (race-free)
**Estimated test count**: ~6 unit tests

### 3-15 MSM 007 â€” Integration
**Test file**: `tests/integration/match-state-server/matchstatechanged_payload.spec.luau` + `afktoggle_4check.spec.luau` + `getparticipation_remotefunction.spec.luau`
**What to test (MatchStateChanged payload)**:
- Schema: `{state, serverTimestamp, stateEndsAt, meta}` all non-nil
- `serverTimestamp = os.clock()` at broadcast time
- `MatchStateClient.reconcile()` accepts and sets `clockOffset` without error
**What to test (ParticipationChanged)**:
- Per-player reliable event on flag flip
- Payload: `{userId, isParticipating}`
**What to test (GetParticipation RemoteFunction)**:
- Stateless reconcile for mid-state-join client
- Returns current flag for caller's UserId
**What to test (AFKToggle 4-Check Guard)**:
- Foundation `RemoteValidator.validate(player, payload, schema)` invoked
- 4 checks: type / size / shape / rate-limit
- Validation failure â†’ silent rejection (no error to client)
- Validation pass â†’ flag flip + ParticipationChanged broadcast
- Snap-freeze rule: TRUEâ†’FALSE during Countdown:Snap rejected (story-001 contract preserved)
**Edge cases**: AFKToggle during Result/Intermission (flag flip allowed); GetParticipation called for non-participating UserId (return false); rate-limit floor (>10 toggles/sec â†’ reject)
**Estimated test count**: ~14 integration tests

## Manual QA Checklist

No story this sprint requires manual verification beyond smoke-check. All criteria are auto-testable via TestEZ. Smoke-check covers integration verification per Sprint 2 protocol.

---

## Smoke Test Scope

Critical paths to verify before any QA hand-off for Sprint 3:

1. Game launches to main menu without crash (regression baseline)
2. New player session starts; PlayerData loads (regression baseline)
3. **Server tick fires 9 phases at 15 Hz** (Sprint 2 carryover; Phase 5/6/7/8 now have real callbacks)
4. **CSM hue/radius/F2 position computed correctly** (3-2/3-3/3-13)
5. **CrowdState broadcast received by client** â€” `CrowdStateClient` mirror dictionary populates within 1 second of crowd creation (3-5/3-11)
6. **MSM transitions Lobby â†’ Countdown:Ready â†’ Snap â†’ Active â†’ Result â†’ Intermission â†’ Lobby** end-to-end (3-6/3-7/3-8/3-9)
7. **CrowdEliminated propagates** from CSM Phase 5 â†’ MSM Phase 7 â†’ Result transition (3-4/3-8)
8. **Phase 6 < Phase 7 ordering** verified â€” same-tick race produces single broadcast (3-7)
9. **Grant-before-broadcast invariant** â€” currency commits before any client sees Result (3-9)
10. **AFKToggle round-trip** (if 3-15 lands) â€” client toggle â†’ 4-check guard â†’ server flag flip â†’ ParticipationChanged â†’ client UI updates
11. **BindToClose orderly shutdown** â€” `stop()` â†’ MSM T11 â†’ ProfileStore release; NO grant during shutdown (3-1)
12. **Performance**: no new frame spikes; broadcast bandwidth within 5.4 KB/s envelope @ 12 crowds

Reference Studio Server Console probe script from `production/qa/smoke-2026-04-30.md`.

---

## Playtest Requirements

| Story | Playtest Goal | Min Sessions | Target Player Type |
|-------|--------------|--------------|-------------------|
| (none) | Sprint 3 is server-only mechanics; no UI/visual surface to playtest | â€” | â€” |

**No playtest sessions required for Sprint 3.** All 15 stories are testable via automated tests + smoke check. Playtest demand re-emerges in Sprint 4 when Feature epics (NPC Spawner / Absorb / Follower Entity) introduce visible behaviors.

---

## Definition of Done â€” Sprint 3

A story is DONE when ALL of the following are true:

- [ ] All acceptance criteria verified â€” automated test result OR documented integration smoke evidence
- [ ] Test file exists at the specified path for ALL 15 stories (every story is Logic or Integration this sprint)
- [ ] Smoke check passes (`/smoke-check sprint`) before QA hand-off
- [ ] No regressions â€” Sprint 2's 149-test baseline still 100% pass
- [ ] 4 audit gates green (selene + audit-asset-ids + audit-persistence + audit-no-competing-heartbeat)
- [ ] Code reviewed via `/code-review` per-story OR sprint close-out aggregate (lean mode)
- [ ] Story file updated to `Status: Complete` (via `/story-done`)

---

## Out of Scope

- **Visual/UI verification** â€” Sprint 3 ships no UI surface; HUD epic deferred to Sprint 5+
- **Multi-client soak validation** â€” broadcast bandwidth + Phase 8 perf tested via math-proxy only; real-server-soak deferred to MVP-Integration-1 sprint per ADR-0003 Â§Validation Sprint Plan
- **Mobile device testing** â€” TickOrch 005 instrumentation hook lands but real-device cadence soak deferred to MVP-Integration-1 per ADR-0002 Â§Risks Risk 1
- **Real Heartbeat soak (â‰¥60s)** â€” every cadence/timer assertion in Sprint 3 uses synthetic `dt=1/60` driver; real-Heartbeat validation deferred to MVP-Integration-1 per ADR-0002 Â§Validation L8

---

## Notes

- Test count estimate: ~172 new tests across 15 spec files (149 baseline + ~172 = ~321 total by sprint end)
- 4 stories rated HIGH engine risk: 3-5 (UREvent + buffer codec â€” already vendored), 3-11 (buffer.read* post-cutoff). Verification via Foundation-shipped codec + `replication-best-practices.md` cite in story headers.
- Story 3-15 closes Sprint 2 advisory item 1 (AFKToggle deferred from MSM 2-8). ADR-0010 Â§4-Check Guard text must be Accepted before 3-15 begins.
- `TestMatchStateBroadcastSpy` infrastructure (referenced in 3-6/3-9 ACs) is gameplay-programmer-provided â€” spy-wraps `MatchStateChanged:FireAllClients` and `RoundLifecycle.createAll`. Build-once, reuse across MSM tests.
